principle: Choose F-pattern layout for text-heavy heroes and Z-pattern for visual-dominant heroes
explanation: X.ux|hero_layout_pattern: text_heavy -> F_pattern: left_aligned + top_to_bottom_reading + CTA_left; visual_dominant -> Z_pattern: center_aligned + diagonal_eye_flow + CTA_center; F_pattern: user_reads_most_of_text; Z_pattern: quick_scan + strong_single_message; NO:center_align_text_heavy_hero NO:left_align_visual_minimal_hero eg: "feature-list_hero_center_aligned" >> "feature-list_hero_left_aligned (F_pattern)"

principle: Always tease content below the fold using a downward arrow, a partially visible section, or a cut-off headline
explanation: X.ux|hero_continuation_tease: users_assume_page_ends_at_fold_without_cue; fix: arrow_pointing_down OR next_section_partially_visible_at_bottom OR headline_cut_off_by_viewport_edge; signals: scroll_for_more; NO:hero_that_fills_100vh_with_no_scroll_cue NO:next_section_starting_exactly_at_fold eg: "full_screen_hero_no_hint_below" >> "hero + arrow_down + 60px_of_next_section_peeking"
